feed.title: Docket updates for IN RE: Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists (GLP-1 RAs) Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3094
feed.rights: Created for the public domain by Free Law Project

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-04-07 in IN RE: Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists (GLP-1 RAs) Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3094
entry.summary: XYZ CASES ENTERED -- 1 related action(s) originating in the transferee district. JPML notified on 4/6/26 via NEF. -- Pennsylvania Eastern District Court (2:26-cv-02205) (JL)

entry.title: Entry #494 in IN RE: Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists (GLP-1 RAs) Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3094
entry.summary: ***TEXT ONLY NOTICE******ALL CASE DOCUMENTS SHALL CONTAIN A PROOF OF SERVICE ON ALL PARTIES WHO DO NOT RECEIVE ELECTRONIC SERVICE THROUGH CM/ECF***NOTICE OF FILING OF CTO AND PUBLICATION OF BRIEFING SCHEDULE (CTO-71) re: pldg. ( 493 in MDL No. 3094, 1 in NJ/2:26-cv-03572, 1 in NJ/2:26-cv-03573, 1 in NJ/2:26-cv-03578) BRIEFING SCHEDULE IS SET AS FOLLOWS: Oppositions due on or before 4/14/2026.Attorneys must be registered to file in the JPML. Please visit our website for Registration Information. Signed by Acting Clerk of the Panel Josh R. Bullock on 4/7/2026. Associated Cases: MDL No. 3094, NJ/2:26-cv-03572, NJ/2:26-cv-03573, NJ/2:26-cv-03578 (CDA) (Entered: 04/07/2026)

entry.title: Entry #492 in IN RE: Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists (GLP-1 RAs) Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3094
entry.summary: CONDITIONAL TRANSFER ORDER FINALIZED (CTO-67) - 3 action(s) re: pldg. ( 480 in MDL No. 3094, 1 in NJ/2:26-cv-03141, 1 in NJ/2:26-cv-03143, 1 in NJ/2:26-cv-03187) Inasmuch as no objection is pending at this time, the stay is lifted. Signed by Acting Clerk of the Panel Josh R. Bullock on 4/7/2026. Associated Cases: MDL No. 3094, NJ/2:26-cv-03141, NJ/2:26-cv-03143, NJ/2:26-cv-03187 (CT) (Entered: 04/07/2026)
